item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses opening another transfer channel, explicitly maps the three prior downstream splits/routes plus today's requested split, and reframes the pattern as repeated exception outsourcing. It moves upstream to routing, ownership, SLA/intake, and closure-rule failures, proposes temporary arbitration only as stopgap, pauses new permanent entrances, and recommends consolidation/redesign of routing rules."}
